# D3keyHelperForLinux v1.0.8

This release brings full multilingual support to the runner process, fixing a long-standing issue where all runner output was hardcoded in Chinese regardless of the selected interface language.

## Highlights

- **Full runner i18n** – all user-visible strings printed by the runner process (`d3keyhelper_linux.py`) now go through the `tr(zh, en)` translation system, covering macro start/stop/pause/resume, profile switch, helper detection results, profile notes, error messages, and startup banners. Supported languages: 简体中文 (zh), English (en), 繁體中文 (zh_TW).
- **Language propagated to runner subprocess** – the GUI now passes `--lang <current_language>` to the runner subprocess via `build_runner_command`, so the runner log in the GUI always matches the selected interface language.
- **Runtime language lookup fix** – `build_runner_command` previously captured `UI_LANGUAGE` at import time (a stale string copy). It now reads `gui_i18n.UI_LANGUAGE` at call time, so language changes made after startup are correctly reflected.
- **New `--lang` CLI argument** – `d3keyhelper_linux.py --lang en` lets terminal users explicitly set the output language; defaults to system locale detection when omitted.

## Bug Fixes

- **Runner log always showed Chinese** – even when the GUI was set to English or Traditional Chinese, all runner subprocess output appeared in Simplified Chinese. Fixed by passing `--lang` from GUI to runner and wrapping all print/emit strings with `tr()`.
- **Stale `UI_LANGUAGE` binding** – `from gui_i18n import UI_LANGUAGE` created a local copy that never updated after `set_ui_language()` was called. Fixed by referencing the module attribute directly at call time.

## Notes

- Existing `d3oldsand.ini` profiles remain fully compatible.
- The AppImage artifact is built automatically by GitHub Actions for this tag.

## 中文摘要

- 运行器（`d3keyhelper_linux.py`）所有用户可见输出现已支持多语言：宏启动/停止/暂停/恢复、配置切换、助手识别结果、配置提示、错误信息、启动横幅均通过 `tr(zh, en)` 翻译。支持简体中文、English、繁體中文。
- GUI 启动运行器时自动透传 `--lang <当前语言>`，日志面板显示语言与界面语言保持一致。
- 修复 `build_runner_command` 中 `UI_LANGUAGE` 为导入时快照的问题：改为运行时读取模块属性，语言切换后立即生效。
- 新增 `--lang` 命令行参数，终端用户可用 `--lang en` 强制指定输出语言，省略时自动跟随系统语言。
